lines.speaker: Gunnar Holdstrom
lines.text: Ah, isn't it a lovely day?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's not bad. What puts you in such a good mood?

lines.speaker: Gunnar Holdstrom
lines.text: Oh, I just love my job. The smell of the sea breeze, the smell of the arctic pine sap, the smell of the yaks. I find it all so bracing.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bracing? Hmmm. I think I might have chosen a different word.
